The '''''Firerider''''' was a lightly modified [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Starwind-class pleasure yacht|''Starwind''-class pleasure yacht]] owned by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Serdo]] that operated in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The yacht was mostly stock except for upgraded [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] and an added [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] that had been taken from a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]]. It was well known as a charter craft for "up and comers" who needed to entertain important persons in style, but who couldn't afford a ship of their own.<ref name="ss" />

Serdo had a reputation for being a trustworthy and reliable being. In actuality, Serdo's charter business with the ''Firerider'' was a cover for his [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-smuggling operation. His high profile clients provided the perfect shield against customs agents, counting on the fact that customs officials wouldn't chance inconveniencing a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], a powerful executive or a high-ranking military officer with an intrusive customs inspection.<ref name="ss" />

Unknown to either Serdo, the ''Firerider'' was a disaster waiting to happen. On one of Serdo's last runs [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] managed to sabotage the [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigational computer]] in an attempt to assassinate a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizers traveling on the ship from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The virus in the nav computer would lie dormant until a specific set of hyperspace coordinates was entered. When activated, the virus would simulate a general systems failure, shutting down power, communications, propulsion and life support, dooming the ship's passengers and crew.<ref name="ss" />

After retiring, Serdo sold the ''Firerider'' to a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] named [[Fiz Cor'gril]] on [[Trevi IV]]. The craft sat on the lot of [[Fizzi's Slightly Used Starships]] for some time.<ref name="ss" />
